---
title: Week notes (2026-W27)
date: 2026-07-03
date-modified: today
categories:
  - week notes
---

- Some more axial coding
- Started a manuscript file with rudimentary background and methods sections
- Started in-depth analysis of interview texts, with help from [this script I made](https://github.com/zackbatist/CITF-Postdoc/blob/main/assets/scripts/generate-excerpts.lua) to extract excerpts into markdown format
